title: Add unit tests for SpecParsingService
description: Expand test coverage for SpecParsingService beyond existing basic tests. Cover edge cases: no requirements, multiple scenarios, RFC 2119 keyword extraction, malformed markdown, multi-domain parsing.

title: Add unit tests for BuiltInValidator
description: Create comprehensive tests for BuiltInValidator covering spec, change, and config validation rules. Include strict mode behavior and edge cases.

title: Add unit tests for CliOutputParser
description: Test JSON and text parsing from CLI output. Cover valid JSON, malformed JSON, plain text fallback, and empty input.

title: Add unit tests for VersionSupport
description: Test version enum behavior: required fields, artifacts, schema validation per version (v1.0, v1.1, v1.2).

title: Handle malformed YAML gracefully in ConfigService
description: Show clear error notification instead of stack trace when config.yaml contains invalid YAML. Include file path and parse error location.

title: Add CLI command timeout configuration
description: Allow users to configure CLI timeout in settings. Default 30s. CliRunner reads from settings. Clear error on timeout.

title: Add progress indicator for long-running operations
description: Show IntelliJ progress bar for CLI commands, API calls, and Generate All. Progress should be cancellable where possible.

title: Improve error messages for API failures
description: DirectApiService errors should include HTTP status, provider-specific details, and suggested fixes. Show in both notification and Console.

title: Add CI pipeline
description: Set up automated build and test pipeline. Build on push/PR, run tests, verify plugin, upload artifacts.

title: Handle concurrent file operations safely
description: Ensure proper ReadAction/WriteAction usage in all file operations. Atomic tree model rebuild. Thread-safe caches.

title: Add keyboard shortcuts for common actions
description: Assign default keyboard shortcuts to Propose, Validate, and Refresh. Document in plugin.xml. No conflicts with IntelliJ defaults.

title: Fix dark theme colors in tree renderer
description: Replace hardcoded colors with JBColor for theme-aware rendering. Test in Darcula and New UI dark theme.

title: Add spec template selection for Propose
description: Template dropdown in ProposeChangeDialog (Feature, Bug Fix, Refactor). Templates pre-fill proposal.md.

title: Add inline quick-fixes for validation issues
description: LocalQuickFix implementations for common validation issues: missing title, missing RFC 2119 keyword, missing metadata file.

title: Improve validation result formatting
description: Display validation results in structured panel with grouped issues, clickable file paths, severity icons, and summary line.

title: Add v2.0 schema support
description: Extend VersionSupport with v2_0 enum value. Define new artifact types and config fields. Maintain v1.x backward compatibility.

title: Add integration tests for action lifecycle
description: Integration tests for full lifecycle: init → propose → generate → apply → archive. Use BasePlatformTestCase.

title: Document all public APIs with Javadoc
description: Add Javadoc to all public classes and methods in services, model, and validation packages.

title: Add tree node tooltips
description: Hover tooltips showing file path, status details, dependency list. HTML-formatted for readability.

title: Add notification grouping
description: Group rapid notifications during batch operations. Show count and expand button. Log to Console in parallel.

title: Support multi-project workspaces
description: Detect multiple openspec/ directories in monorepos. Show all roots in tool window. Per-root settings.

title: Publish to JetBrains Marketplace
description: Complete plugin metadata, icon, verification. Publish and verify marketplace installation works.

title: Add Ollama integration for local AI
description: Support Ollama as local AI provider. OpenAI-compatible API at localhost:11434. Model selection from locally available models.

title: Add streaming API response support
description: Streaming responses from Claude/OpenAI via SSE. Real-time display in Console. Cancellation support.

title: Add spec search and filtering
description: Search/filter bar in Browse tab. Filter tree nodes by keyword. Highlight matches. Keyboard shortcut to focus.

title: Register OpenSpec file types
description: Register .openspec.yaml, spec.md, and delta spec files with custom icons and file type associations.

title: Add change diff viewer
description: Right-click change to view spec diff (original vs. with delta specs applied). Uses IntelliJ DiffManager.

title: Add OpenSpec file templates
description: File → New templates for spec.md and delta spec files. Available only inside openspec/ directories.

title: Add config.yaml code completion
description: CompletionContributor for config.yaml: top-level keys, schema version values, profile names.

title: Create wiki documentation
description: Populate Forgejo wiki with comprehensive user manual and developer documentation (17 pages).

title: Set up project tracking infrastructure
description: Configure Forgejo labels, milestones, and issues. Set up Plane project with cycles and work items.
